[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101001010 4
1 1011010100 5
2 1011110111 8
3 0110001111 6
4 0011000101 4
5 1111111111 a
6 1110010001 5
7 0011101111 7
